Santa Rosa Mountains and San Jacinto Mountains

questions.q: What is the approximate average annual rainfall along the coast of San Diego?

choices: A hilly peninsula west of downtown

choices: The opening of the Convention Center
The construction of the Bay Bridge

questions.q: What political composition characterized the San Diego City Council as of recent years?

choices: California–Nevada and San Diego World's Fair
Pacific International and California State Fair

choices: To celebrate the opening of the Panama Canal and regional development
